touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Hannah Carter at PrimeEdge. No response received.
Cold email sent to Hannah regarding pipeline visibility challenges at marketing agencies. Hannah responded expressing interest in learning more about our forecasting capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Do you work with other agencies our size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have several agency clients in the 40-60 employee range using our platform for pipeline visibility.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Hannah Carter to understand PrimeEdge's current pipeline management process. Hannah shared that they're currently using spreadsheets and considering Clari. She's looking for better visibility into deal stages and more accurate forecasting for their sales team. Budget appears to be in range for 8 seats.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a new solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our leadership team needs better forecast accuracy. We've missed our quarterly targets twice this year due to poor pipeline visibility.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive on pricing and can discuss specific numbers after understanding your full requirements.

next_steps: Send follow-up email with case studies

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with agency case studies and calendar link for demo. Hannah confirmed demo time and asked about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: For a team your size, typical implementation is 2-3 weeks with our unlimited automation package.

touches.ai_summary: Initial product demo with Hannah focusing on pipeline visibility features and forecasting automation. Walked through deal stage tracking, reporting dashboards, and integration with their current CRM. Hannah was engaged and took notes on specific features.

questions_asked.question: Which features are most critical for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Automated pipeline reports and deal stage tracking are top priorities. We need something our reps will actually use.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the deal stages to match our sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable stages and fields are included in the unlimited automation tier.

objections: Hannah mentioned that some features seem similar to what Clari offers and wants to understand the differentiation better.
next_steps: Schedule deeper dive demo on automation capabilities

touches.ai_summary: Deep dive demo session focused on automation workflows and competitive differentiation from Clari. Demonstrated custom automation rules, notification systems, and advanced reporting. Hannah asked detailed questions about specific use cases and appeared to be building a business case internally. Discussion touched on pricing expectations.

questions_asked.question: Can we automate alerts when deals stall in a stage for too long?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that's a core feature. You can set custom thresholds by stage and assign automatic follow-up tasks.

questions_asked.question: Have you had a chance to discuss this with your leadership team?
questions_asked.answer: I've mentioned it to my manager but haven't presented formally yet. I want to make sure I understand the full solution first.

questions_asked.question: What kind of discount can you offer for an annual commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss pricing in detail once we align on the solution fit. Annual commitments do typically come with better rates.

next_steps: Schedule meeting with leadership if possible

touches.ai_summary: Meeting was rescheduled from original time. Conducted proposal review with Hannah (no additional executives joined). Presented pricing at $6,000 ACV for 8 seats with unlimited automation. Hannah expressed concern about getting executive approval without having involved them earlier. She requested a discount to help make the business case stronger internally.

questions_asked.question: Is this your best pricing, or is there room to negotiate?
questions_asked.answer: We have some flexibility, especially for annual commitments. What budget range were you working with?

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to have a conversation with your VP or CEO to align on strategic value?
questions_asked.answer: Let me see if I can get the pricing approved first. I think I can make this work if we can bring the number down a bit.

objections: Hannah mentioned that Clari came in at a lower price point for a similar package.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with revised proposal reflecting 27% discount to match competitive pressure. Emphasized value of unlimited automation tier and offered to connect with their executive team to discuss strategic implementation. Hannah acknowledged receipt and said she's reviewing with finance.

Check-in email on proposal status and contract timing. Hannah responded that they're still working through internal approvals and comparing final terms with Clari. She expects a decision within the next week but couldn't commit to a specific timeline.

questions_asked.question: Can you hold this pricing if we need another week to finalize?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this pricing is valid through end of quarter. Happy to hold it while you complete your evaluation.

next_steps: Offer to address any final questions
